notableEvents.label: Mike Yastrzemski pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Cardinals challenged (play at 1st), call on the field was overturned: Mike Yastrzemski grounds out, second baseman JJ Wetherholt to first baseman Blaze Jordan.

notableEvents.label: Mike Yastrzemski pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Mike Yastrzemski singles on a soft ground ball to third baseman José Fermín. Mauricio Dubón to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Wild pitch run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Wild pitch by pitcher Ryan Fernandez. Mauricio Dubón scores. Mike Yastrzemski to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Dominic Smith pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Dominic Smith walks. Ha-Seong Kim to 2nd.
